caption: A man with a tall, silver, brush-like hairstyle, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a small red bowtie and gold suspenders. He sits in front of a professional microphone, with a background featuring a wall of framed photographs and clothing racks with "LEE" branded items. On-screen logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appear in the bottom left and right of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man is actively speaking and gesturing. Initially, he holds both hands up in front of his chest, then transitions to a neutral posture while speaking, and finally raises his right hand in a gesture. His facial expressions shift from concentrated to animated as he talks into the microphone.
